chapter_title.en: Chapter on Voluntary Fasting and Its Rewards on Different Days

text: 1817 - وَ رَوَى اَلْمُفَضَّلُ بْنُ عُمَرَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «صَوْمُ يَوْمِ غَدِيرِ خُمٍّ كَفَّارَةُ سِتِّينَ سَنَةً.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1817 - It is narrated by al-Mufaddal ibn Umar from Abu Abdullah (Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as)), who said:
"Fasting on the Day of Ghadir Khumm is an expiation for sixty years."
